div1.entryFree: Arthur, 1) the fabulous king of Britain: when A. first in court, H4B II, 4, 36. I was then Sir Dagonet in --'s show, III, 2, 300 (an exhibition of archery by a toxophilite society in London, whose members assumed the names of the knights of the Round Table). he's in --'s bosom (for Abraham's) H5 II, 3, 10. -- 2) A. Plantagenet, nephew to king John: John I, 9. II, 2. II, 2 156 (A. of Bretagne). III, 4, 160 etc. etc. -- 3) elder brother of Henry VIII: H8 III, 2, 71.
